domain_claim: Lane::{Kani,Mutants} parse round-trip via PascalCase; reject any non-canonical string.
notes: Pure Rust; round-trip via Lane::from_str(Lane::name(l)).unwrap() == l; rejects invalid strings.

domain_claim: GateScope::Full parses and round-trips; edit/prepush/release unchanged.
notes: Round-trip identity for all 4 variants; rejects unrelated strings.

domain_claim: KaniHarnessId accepts only uppercase ASCII with underscore; rejects empty, lowercase, non-ASCII, leading-digit, length-overflow, no-underscore.
notes: Mirrors RuleId validator with stricter surface.

domain_claim: KaniHarnessId serde_json round-trip preserves identity for every valid id.
notes: Pure serde round-trip over json; canonical form.

domain_claim: MutantId construction requires 1-based (line, col), well-formed path, recognized operator from a closed set.
notes: Operator enum: equal_replace, not_inserted, and_or, integer_plus_one, integer_minus_one, arithmetic_op_flip.

domain_claim: MutantsBaseline::load surfaces typed MutantsBaselineError on missing/invalid/wrong-schema files; happy path returns Ok.
notes: Each error variant must carry a typed payload, not a String.

domain_claim: MutantsBaseline::diff is set difference: |diff| ≤ |survivors| and s ∈ diff iff s ∈ survivors ∧ s ∉ baseline.
notes: Pure function; non-vacuity via Kani cover! on empty/non-empty survivors.

domain_claim: Expired baseline entries do not suppress findings (date-based accept/suppress rule).
notes: Date parameterised; test injects fixed Date for determinism.

domain_claim: SkipReason::ToolUnavailable(ToolKind) serde round-trip preserves tool kind via kebab-case JSON.
Every Lane variant has a unique PascalCase name string.
notes: Adds two new variants to existing v1 invariant.

domain_claim: Lane serde_json round-trip preserves every variant (PascalCase).
notes: Canonical wire-format proof for the aggregate layer.

domain_claim: Kani harness function name lower-cased + underscored maps to a valid KaniHarnessId.
notes: Bounded String ≤ 32 in harness; non-vacuity via kani::cover!.

domain_claim: MutantsBaseline::diff has zero false negatives: every survivor not in baseline appears in diff.
notes: Bounded Vec<MutantId> size ≤ 8; cover! hits both empty and non-empty survivors.

domain_claim: MutantId::new enforces operator ∈ MUTANT_OPERATORS closed set.
notes: STRONG production-binding required for hot-path; proptest shadow allowed.

domain_claim: Atomic baseline load under concurrency: distinct threads see the same baseline (no half-written file).
notes: Loom exercises the artifact-writer atomic rename pattern.

domain_claim: parse_inventory rejects malformed cargo-kani list JSON; never panics.
notes: libFuzzer corpus seed from real cargo-kani inventory JSON.

domain_claim: parse_outcomes returns Result, never panics; ignores unknown keys.
